name: Learn-RV
description: Turn any YouTube video, PDF, or podcast into a queryable knowledge base — stored in RVF format, entirely on your Seed. Ask questions with timestamped citations. No cloud. No services.
author: Stuart Kerr <stuart@isovision.ai>

tools.name: kb_query
tools.description: Semantic search over a topic KB

tools.name: kb_synthesize
tools.description: Generate a cited answer from retrieved chunks

tools.name: kb_list_videos
tools.description: List all videos ingested into a topic
